positive_scenarios.expected_result: User is successfully authenticated and redirected to the dashboard/home page with a valid session established
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Verify the login page is displayed with username and password fields
Enter 'testd1051@gmail.com' in the email/username field
Enter the valid password in the password field
Click the 'Login' or 'Submit' button
Verify the user is redirected away from the login page
Verify the dashboard or home page is displayed
Verify the authenticated user session is active (e.g., user name or avatar is visible in the header)
positive_scenarios.title: Successful login with valid username and password

positive_scenarios.expected_result: User session persists after page refresh and the user remains authenticated without being forced to log in again
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter 'testd1051@gmail.com' in the email/username field
Enter the valid password in the password field
Click the 'Login' or 'Submit' button
Verify the dashboard or home page is displayed
Refresh the browser page (F5 or browser refresh)
Verify the user remains on the dashboard/home page and is not redirected back to the login page
Verify the authenticated session is still active
positive_scenarios.title: Successful login and verify user remains logged in on page refresh

positive_scenarios.expected_result: Password visibility toggle works correctly and user is successfully logged in after toggling visibility
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter 'testd1051@gmail.com' in the email/username field
Enter the valid password in the password field
Verify the password is masked by default (shown as dots or asterisks)
Click the 'Show Password' or eye icon toggle button
Verify the password text is now visible in plain text
Click the toggle again to hide the password
Verify the password is masked again
Click the 'Login' or 'Submit' button
Verify the user is successfully logged in and redirected to the dashboard
positive_scenarios.title: Successful login with password visibility toggle

positive_scenarios.expected_result: User is successfully logged in by pressing Enter key, confirming keyboard accessibility support
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter 'testd1051@gmail.com' in the email/username field
Press the Tab key to move focus to the password field
Enter the valid password in the password field
Press the 'Enter' key on the keyboard without clicking the Login button
Verify the login form is submitted
Verify the user is redirected to the dashboard or home page
Verify the authenticated session is active
positive_scenarios.title: Successful login using keyboard Enter key instead of clicking Login button

positive_scenarios.expected_result: User is successfully logged out, session is terminated, and accessing protected pages redirects back to the login page
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter 'testd1051@gmail.com' in the email/username field
Enter the valid password in the password field
Click the 'Login' or 'Submit' button
Verify the user is redirected to the dashboard or home page
Click the 'Logout' or 'Sign Out' button/link (typically in the user menu or header)
Verify the user is redirected back to the login page
Attempt to navigate back using the browser back button
Verify the user is not able to access the dashboard and is redirected to the login page
positive_scenarios.title: Successful logout after login and verify session is terminated

positive_scenarios.expected_result: Already authenticated users attempting to access the login page are automatically redirected to the dashboard/home page
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter 'testd1051@gmail.com' in the email/username field
Enter the valid password in the password field
Click the 'Login' or 'Submit' button
Verify the user is redirected to the dashboard or home page
Manually navigate back to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login in the browser address bar
Verify the already-authenticated user is automatically redirected away from the login page to the dashboard
positive_scenarios.title: Login page redirects authenticated user away from login page

negative_scenarios.expected_result: Validation error messages are displayed for both empty fields and the user is not logged in
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Leave the email/username field empty
Leave the password field empty
Click the 'Login' or 'Submit' button
Verify the form is not submitted and the user remains on the login page
Verify an appropriate error message is displayed such as 'Email is required' or 'Username is required'
Verify a password-related error message is also displayed such as 'Password is required'
negative_scenarios.title: Login attempt with empty username and empty password

negative_scenarios.expected_result: Login fails with an appropriate error message indicating invalid credentials; user is not authenticated
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter 'testd1051@gmail.com' in the email/username field
Enter an incorrect password such as 'WrongPassword123!' in the password field
Click the 'Login' or 'Submit' button
Verify the user remains on the login page
Verify an error message is displayed such as 'Invalid credentials', 'Incorrect password', or 'Username or password is incorrect'
Verify no session or authentication token is created
negative_scenarios.title: Login attempt with valid username and incorrect password

negative_scenarios.expected_result: A validation error is displayed indicating the email format is invalid and the login attempt is blocked
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter an invalid email format 'notanemail' in the email/username field
Enter any password such as 'Password123!' in the password field
Click the 'Login' or 'Submit' button
Verify the form is not submitted or an error is shown
Verify a validation error message is displayed such as 'Please enter a valid email address' or 'Invalid email format'
Verify the user remains on the login page and is not authenticated
negative_scenarios.title: Login attempt with invalid email format in username field

negative_scenarios.expected_result: A validation error is displayed for the empty password field and the user is not authenticated
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter 'testd1051@gmail.com' in the email/username field
Leave the password field completely empty
Click the 'Login' or 'Submit' button
Verify the form is not submitted
Verify a validation error message is displayed such as 'Password is required' or 'Please enter your password'
Verify the user remains on the login page and is not authenticated
negative_scenarios.title: Login attempt with empty password field only

negative_scenarios.expected_result: Login fails with an appropriate error message; the system does not reveal whether the email account exists
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter a non-existent email 'nonexistentuser99999@gmail.com' in the email/username field
Enter any password such as 'Password123!' in the password field
Click the 'Login' or 'Submit' button
Verify the user remains on the login page
Verify an error message is displayed such as 'User not found', 'Invalid credentials', or 'No account found with this email'
Verify the error message does not explicitly confirm whether the email exists (to prevent user enumeration)
negative_scenarios.title: Login attempt with non-existent user email

negative_scenarios.expected_result: The application safely handles the SQL injection attempt without authenticating the user or exposing sensitive system information
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter SQL injection payload ''' OR '1'='1' --' in the email/username field
Enter any value such as 'Password123!' in the password field
Click the 'Login' or 'Submit' button
Verify the application does not authenticate the user
Verify the application displays a validation error or invalid credentials message
Verify the application does not crash or expose any database error messages
Verify the user remains on the login page
negative_scenarios.title: Login attempt with SQL injection in username field

negative_scenarios.expected_result: The application gracefully handles boundary/overflow input with an appropriate error message without crashing
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter an excessively long email string of 300 characters such as 'aaaaaaa...aaaaaa@gmail.com' in the email/username field
Enter an excessively long password string of 300 characters in the password field
Click the 'Login' or 'Submit' button
Verify the application does not crash or become unresponsive
Verify an appropriate error message is displayed such as 'Invalid email', 'Input too long', or 'Invalid credentials'
Verify the user is not authenticated and remains on the login page
negative_scenarios.title: Login attempt with excessively long email and password values

negative_scenarios.expected_result: The application trims whitespace and treats the fields as empty or invalid, displaying appropriate error messages without authenticating the user
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter multiple space characters '     ' in the email/username field
Enter multiple space characters '     ' in the password field
Click the 'Login' or 'Submit' button
Verify the form is not submitted successfully
Verify an appropriate validation error is displayed such as 'Email is required', 'Invalid email', or 'Please enter valid credentials'
Verify the user is not authenticated and remains on the login page
negative_scenarios.title: Login attempt with only whitespace characters in username and password fields
